inputs.label: Taskbar auto-hide
inputs.description: Hide the Windows taskbar until the pointer reaches the screen edge.

inputs.label: Refresh rate (Hz)
inputs.description: Target display refresh rate in hertz.

inputs.label: Tray resolution presets
inputs.description: Select which detected resolutions appear in the tray menu.

actions.label: Read taskbar and display status
actions.description: Query the current taskbar, resolution, and scaling values from the host.
actions.script: Query taskbar auto-hide, current resolution, and current scale from daemon host API.

actions.label: Toggle taskbar auto-hide
actions.description: Flip the taskbar between pinned and auto-hide states.
actions.script: Toggle Windows taskbar auto-hide state and return updated status.

actions.label: Set taskbar auto-hide
actions.description: Apply the saved taskbar auto-hide setting.
actions.script: Apply taskbarAutoHide from settings and return updated status.

actions.label: Set display resolution
actions.description: Apply the saved resolution and refresh rate values.
actions.script: Apply resolutionWidth, resolutionHeight, and refreshRate through daemon host API.

actions.label: Set display scale
actions.description: Apply the saved display scale percentage.
actions.script: Apply scalePercent via daemon host API and return updated status.

settings.title: Display
settings.description: Configure taskbar behavior, resolution, and scale in one place.

sections.title: Tray menu
sections.description: Choose which resolution presets appear in the tray shortcut menu.

status.title: Current status
status.description: Latest values reported by the Windows host APIs.
